steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The word 'However' signals a shift from discussing Villasana’s portrayals of cultural icons to her depictions of ordinary people.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
The passage first outlines Villasana’s yarn‑on‑photo method, then gives two contrasting examples—Prince and a sidewalk girl—and finally connects both approaches to her aim of showing the power and interconnectedness of all people.
The other choices either introduce topics not mentioned (her background, other artists, yarn’s history) or mischaracterize the focus.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
